race.comment: WITHIN THE LAW (10) made late ground but was no match for Skyhook two back over this trip in the Gunsynd at Eagle Farm. Set an impossible task from near the tail in the Tiara last Saturday. Rock hard fit at the fourth run back. A lack of tempo is her biggest enemy so a gun Dylan Gibbons ride is probably required. PLATINUM PANTHEON (1) was ridden more aggressively last time out at Ipswich and went within a nose of toppling KOHLER KID in a thriller. New to this trip but it looks the right move. KOHLER KID (4) came from the clouds to get up in the shadows over 1350m at Ipswich a fortnight ago. Unproven at the mile but has racing pattern suggest he will run it right out. The consistent CELLARMASTER (5) went back from a wide alley before making a belated bid in the same race as WITHIN THE LAW at Eagle Farm recently. Sure to be thereabouts again.
